title: Electronic Record for Continuity of Patient Care
author: José Carlos Serufo Filho
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.vq7e5zn

steps.instruction: 1. Start the timer as soon as the session coordination begins to speak of a clinical case that wishes to transfer care to the next team. 2. End the timer when the session coordination finishes reporting the last clinical case you wish to transfer care to the next team.

steps.title: Write down on the form how...
steps.instruction: Write down on the form how many times the transfer of care has been interrupted by any other matters. Interruption by phone call, to talk about personal issues, to talk about work issues that are not directly linked to the clinical cases under discussion, etc.

steps.title: There is no need to time...
steps.instruction: There is no need to time the interrupts or discount the time in the overall timing.

steps.title: If there are any long interrupts,...
steps.instruction: If there are any long interrupts, note in the REMARKS field.

steps.title: Number of physicians scaled
steps.instruction: Number of physicians scaled: record unit pattern (eg 4 preceptors, 4 gynecology residents and 2neonatology residents).

steps.title: Number of physicians present in the session
steps.instruction: Number of physicians present in the session. There is no need to ask or record the reason for the absence. Just enter the number of doctors who were present at the beginning of the session, even if it exits before the end.

steps.title: Who wrote the written document
steps.instruction: Who wrote the written document. Mark x in the category (s). There is no need to note the name (s). Do not interrupt the session to ask who prepared the document, ask at the end.

steps.title: Who coordinated the session
steps.instruction: Who coordinated the session. There is no need to note the name (s).

steps.title: Document written with the cases of the shift
steps.instruction: Document written with the cases of the shift: Take 1.

steps.title: a copy of the written document...
steps.instruction: a copy of the written document containing the clinical information of the care transfer session. 1.

steps.title: Store it in the identified plastic envelope of the session
steps.instruction: Store it in the identified plastic envelope of the session.

steps.title: Evaluate the total number of patients admitted to the Unit
steps.instruction: Evaluate the total number of patients admitted to the Unit: 2.

steps.title: Open the existing PEP-MV system at Hospital das Clínicas
steps.instruction: Open the existing PEP-MV system at Hospital das Clínicas. If you do not have access, wait for the session to finish and ask a doctor to do so. 2.

steps.title: Check on the inpatient screen how...
steps.instruction: Check on the inpatient screen how many are active in the unit: Maternity (women only, not including newborn) or Pediatric ICU. 2.

steps.title: Out-of-hospital patients
steps.instruction: Out-of-hospital patients: who are in urgent need of care awaiting results or patients awaiting transfer, but are not hospitalized, should not be counted.

steps.title: Record the total number of patients in the passometer 3
steps.instruction: Record the total number of patients in the passometer 3.

steps.title: Count the number of patients who...
steps.instruction: Count the number of patients who are registered in the written document and record the form.
